scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/frontend && npm run build -w packages/action-llama
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w packages/action-llama && rm -rf packages/shared/dist
scripts.release: npm run build && changeset publish -w packages/action-llama --tag next
scripts.promote: npm dist-tag add @action-llama/action-llama@$(npm view @action-llama/action-llama dist-tags.next) latest
